arts.sum: Germany's preeminent footballing publication reports that - after completing a Friday medical in the Saxon capital - Ridle Baku's transfer to RB Leipzig will be officially confirmed. Transfer gurus Fabrizio Romano, Gianluca di Marzio, and Philipp Hinze, meanwhile, also report that the German Red Bulls have secured the services of another player.
